basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 34 Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Teaching Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 02 July 2026 on the official website https://www.esic.gov.in/. A total of 34 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification No. CG-DL-E-05072025-264399 dated 30.06.2025
qualification.details: Professor: As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification No. CG-DL-E-05072025-264399 dated 30.06.2025 Associate Professor: As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification No. CG-DL-E-05072025-264399 dated 30.06.2025 Assistant Professor: As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification No. CG-DL-E-05072025-264399 dated 30.06.2025

salary_details.details: Professor: Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 1,18,500/- (Level 13) + Other Allowances* Associate Professor: Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 78,800/- (Level 12) + Other Allowances* Assistant Professor: Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 67,700/- (Level 11) + Other Allowances*

rows.employees_state_insurance_corporation_es: As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification No. CG-DL-E-05072025-264399 dated 30.06.2025

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Professor: As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification No. CG-DL-E-05072025-264399 dated 30.06.2025 Associate Professor: As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification No. CG-DL-E-05072025-264399 dated 30.06.2025 Assistant Professor: As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification No. CG-DL-E-05072025-264399 dated 30.06.2025

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Professor: Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 1,18,500/- (Level 13) + Other Allowances* Associate Professor: Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 78,800/- (Level 12) + Other Allowances* Assistant Professor: Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 67,700/- (Level 11) + Other Allowances*

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts is scheduled to be held on 10th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ESIC?
faq.answer: ESIC has announced a total of 34 vacancies for the Teaching Faculty positions, including Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts are as per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification No. CG-DL-E-05072025-264399 dated 30.06.2025.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the ESIC Teaching Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Teaching Faculty posts is 69 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the ESIC Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary varies based on the post: Professor (Level 13), Associate Professor (Level 12), and Assistant Professor (Level 11), with fixed basic pay and other allowances.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the ESIC Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ESIC Teaching Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification followed by a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Guwahati, Assam, at the ESIC location with pincode 781022.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. A duly filled application form may also be required.
